func New
type Account struct { Balance json.Number `json:"balance"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Currency AccountCurrency `json:"currency"` ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` Public bool `json:"public"` State AccountState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type AccountBankDetailsItem struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no,omitempty"` BankCountry BankCountryCode `json:"bank_country,omitempty"` Beneficiary string `json:"beneficiary"` BeneficiaryAddress BeneficiaryAddress `json:"beneficiary_address"` BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` EstimatedTime EstimatedTime `json:"estimated_time"` IBAN string `json:"iban,omitempty"` Pooled bool `json:"pooled,omitempty"` RoutingNumber string `json:"routing_number,omitempty"` Schemes []PaymentSystem `json:"schemes"` SortCode string `json:"sort_code,omitempty"` UniqueReference string `json:"unique_reference,omitempty"` }
type AccountCurrency core.Currency
type AccountNameValidationReasonAU struct { Code AccountNameValidationReasonAUCode `json:"code,omitempty"` Type AccountNameValidationReasonAUType `json:"type,omitempty"` }
type AccountNameValidationReasonAUCode string
type AccountNameValidationReasonAUType string
type AccountNameValidationReasonEUR struct { Code AccountNameValidationReasonEURCode `json:"code,omitempty"` Type AccountNameValidationReasonEURType `json:"type,omitempty"` }
type AccountNameValidationReasonEURCode string
type AccountNameValidationReasonEURType string
type AccountNameValidationReasonRO struct { Code AccountNameValidationReasonROCode `json:"code,omitempty"` Type AccountNameValidationReasonROType `json:"type,omitempty"` }
type AccountNameValidationReasonROCode string
type AccountNameValidationReasonROType string
type AccountNameValidationReasonUK struct { Code AccountNameValidationReasonUKCode `json:"code,omitempty"` Type AccountNameValidationReasonUKType `json:"type,omitempty"` }
type AccountNameValidationReasonUKCode string
type AccountNameValidationReasonUKType string
type AccountState string
type Accounting struct { t *transport.Transport }
type AccountingCategoryResponse struct { Code string `json:"code,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` DefaultTaxRateID string `json:"default_tax_rate_id,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type AccountingTaxRate struct { Name string `json:"name"` Percentage json.Number `json:"percentage,omitempty"` }
type Accounts struct { t *transport.Transport }
type Amount json.Number
type AmountWithCurrency struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency,omitempty"` }
type BankCountryCode string
type BeneficiaryAddress struct { City string `json:"city,omitempty"` Country string `json:"country"` Postcode string `json:"postcode"` Region string `json:"region,omitempty"` StreetLine1 string `json:"street_line1,omitempty"` StreetLine2 string `json:"street_line2,omitempty"` }
type BusinessMerchantCategory string
type CardCanBeUnlocked bool
type CardContact string
type CardCreatedResponse struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts"` CanBeUnlocked CardCanBeUnlocked `json:"can_be_unlocked,omitempty"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` ContactIds []CardContact `json:"contact_ids,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Expiry string `json:"expiry"` HolderID string `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Label string `json:"label,omitempty"` LastDigits string `json:"last_digits"` MerchantControls MerchantControlsSchema `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` Product CardProduct `json:"product,omitempty"` References []CardReference `json:"references,omitempty"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimits `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod *CardCreatedResponseSpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` State CardState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` Virtual bool `json:"virtual"` }
type CardCreatedResponseSpendingPeriod struct { EndDate *time.Time `json:"end_date,omitempty"` EndDateAction CardCreatedResponseSpendingPeriodEndDateAction `json:"end_date_action,omitempty"` StartDate *time.Time `json:"start_date,omitempty"` }
type CardCreatedResponseSpendingPeriodEndDateAction string
type CardInvitationCardID string
type CardInvitationCreatedAt time.Time
type CardInvitationCreatedHolderID string
type CardInvitationCreatedResponse struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` CreatedAt CardInvitationCreatedAt `json:"created_at"` ExpiryDate CardInvitationExpiryDate `json:"expiry_date,omitempty"` HolderID CardInvitationCreatedHolderID `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` ID CardInvitationID `json:"id"` Label CardInvitationLabel `json:"label,omitempty"` MerchantControls CardInvitationMerchantControls `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimits `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod CardInvitationSpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` State CardInvitationState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt CardInvitationUpdatedAt `json:"updated_at"` Virtual CardInvitationVirtual `json:"virtual"` }
type CardInvitationExpiryDate time.Time
type CardInvitationHolderID string
type CardInvitationID string
type CardInvitationLabel string
type CardInvitationMerchantControls struct { ControlType CardInvitationMerchantControlsControlType `json:"control_type"` MerchantIds []string `json:"merchant_ids"` }
type CardInvitationMerchantControlsControlType string
type CardInvitationResponse struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts"` CardID CardInvitationCardID `json:"card_id,omitempty"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` CreatedAt CardInvitationCreatedAt `json:"created_at"` ExpiryDate CardInvitationExpiryDate `json:"expiry_date,omitempty"` HolderID CardInvitationHolderID `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` ID CardInvitationID `json:"id"` Label CardInvitationLabel `json:"label,omitempty"` MerchantControls CardInvitationMerchantControls `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` SpendProgram SpendProgram `json:"spend_program,omitempty"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimits `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod CardInvitationSpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` State CardInvitationState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt CardInvitationUpdatedAt `json:"updated_at"` Virtual CardInvitationVirtual `json:"virtual"` }
type CardInvitationSpendProgram struct { Label string `json:"label"` }
type CardInvitationSpendingLimits struct { AllTime SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"all_time,omitempty"` Day SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"day,omitempty"` Month SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"month,omitempty"` Quarter SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"quarter,omitempty"` Single SpendingLimitSingleTransaction `json:"single,omitempty"` Week SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"week,omitempty"` Year SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"year,omitempty"` }

type CardInvitationSpendingPeriodEndDateAction string
type CardInvitationState string
type CardInvitationUpdatedAt time.Time
type CardInvitationUpdatedResponse struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` CreatedAt CardInvitationCreatedAt `json:"created_at"` ExpiryDate CardInvitationExpiryDate `json:"expiry_date,omitempty"` HolderID CardInvitationCreatedHolderID `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` ID CardInvitationID `json:"id"` Label CardInvitationLabel `json:"label,omitempty"` MerchantControls CardInvitationMerchantControls `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` SpendProgram SpendProgram `json:"spend_program,omitempty"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimits `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod CardInvitationSpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` State CardInvitationState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt CardInvitationUpdatedAt `json:"updated_at"` Virtual CardInvitationVirtual `json:"virtual"` }
type CardInvitationVirtual bool
type CardInvitations struct { t *transport.Transport }
type CardInvitationsBody struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts,omitempty"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` ExpiryPeriod string `json:"expiry_period,omitempty"` HolderID string `json:"holder_id"` Label string `json:"label,omitempty"` MerchantControls MerchantControlsSchema `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimitsSchema `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod *CardInvitationsBodySpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` Virtual bool `json:"virtual"` }

type CardProduct struct { Code string `json:"code"` }
type CardReference struct { Name string `json:"name"` Value string `json:"value"` }
type CardResponse struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts"` CanBeUnlocked CardCanBeUnlocked `json:"can_be_unlocked,omitempty"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` ContactIds []CardContact `json:"contact_ids,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Expiry string `json:"expiry"` HolderID string `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Label string `json:"label,omitempty"` LastDigits string `json:"last_digits"` MerchantControls MerchantControlsSchema `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` Product CardProduct `json:"product,omitempty"` References []CardReference `json:"references,omitempty"` SpendProgram SpendProgram `json:"spend_program,omitempty"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimits `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod *CardResponseSpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` State CardState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` Virtual bool `json:"virtual"` }

type CardState string
type Cards struct { t *transport.Transport }
type CardsBody struct { Accounts []string `json:"accounts,omitempty"` Categories []BusinessMerchantCategory `json:"categories,omitempty"` ContactIds []string `json:"contact_ids,omitempty"` Countries []string `json:"countries,omitempty"` HolderID string `json:"holder_id,omitempty"` Label string `json:"label,omitempty"` MerchantControls MerchantControlsSchema `json:"merchant_controls,omitempty"` Product *CardsBodyProduct `json:"product,omitempty"` References []CardReference `json:"references,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id"` SpendingLimits SpendingLimitsSchema `json:"spending_limits,omitempty"` SpendingPeriod *CardsBodySpendingPeriod `json:"spending_period,omitempty"` Virtual bool `json:"virtual"` }
type CardsBodyProduct struct { Code string `json:"code"` }

type Category struct { Code string `json:"code,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` }
type ChargeBearer string
type Client struct { transport *transport.Transport Counterparties *Counterparties Accounting *Accounting Accounts *Accounts CardInvitations *CardInvitations Cards *Cards ForeignExchange *ForeignExchange Expenses *Expenses Transfers *Transfers PaymentDrafts *PaymentDrafts PayoutLinks *PayoutLinks TeamMembers *TeamMembers Simulations *Simulations Transactions *Transactions WebhooksV2 *WebhooksV2 }
type Counterparties struct { t *transport.Transport }
type Counterparty struct { Accounts []CounterpartyAccount `json:"accounts,omitempty"` Cards []CounterpartyCard `json:"cards,omitempty"` Country CountryCode `json:"country,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` ProfileType ProfileType `json:"profile_type,omitempty"` Revtag string `json:"revtag,omitempty"` State CounterpartyState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type CounterpartyAccount struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no,omitempty"` BankCountry BankCountryCode `json:"bank_country,omitempty"` BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` BSBCode string `json:"bsb_code,omitempty"` Clabe string `json:"clabe,omitempty"` Currency AccountCurrency `json:"currency"` IBAN string `json:"iban,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Ifsc string `json:"ifsc,omitempty"` Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` RecipientCharges CounterpartyAccountRecipientCharges `json:"recipient_charges,omitempty"` RoutingNumber string `json:"routing_number,omitempty"` SortCode string `json:"sort_code,omitempty"` Type CounterpartyAccountType `json:"type"` }
type CounterpartyAccountRecipientCharges string
type CounterpartyAccountType string
type CounterpartyCard struct { Country CountryCodeCard `json:"country"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` ID string `json:"id"` LastDigits string `json:"last_digits"` Name string `json:"name"` Scheme CounterpartyCardScheme `json:"scheme"` }
type CounterpartyCardScheme string
type CounterpartyError struct { Code int `json:"code"` Message string `json:"message"` Params CounterpartyErrorParams `json:"params,omitempty"` }
type CounterpartyErrorParams struct { CounterpartyID string `json:"counterparty_id,omitempty"` }
type CounterpartyState string
type CountryCode string
type CountryCodeCard string
type CountryCodeMerchant string
type CreateAccountingCategoryRequest struct { Code string `json:"code"` DefaultTaxRateID string `json:"default_tax_rate_id,omitempty"` Name string `json:"name"` }
type CreateCounterpartyRequest struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no,omitempty"` Address BeneficiaryAddress `json:"address,omitempty"` BankCountry BankCountryCode `json:"bank_country,omitempty"` BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` BSBCode string `json:"bsb_code,omitempty"` Clabe string `json:"clabe,omitempty"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency,omitempty"` IBAN string `json:"iban,omitempty"` Ifsc string `json:"ifsc,omitempty"` IndividualName IndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` ProfileType CreateCounterpartyRequestProfileType `json:"profile_type,omitempty"` Revtag string `json:"revtag,omitempty"` RoutingNumber string `json:"routing_number,omitempty"` SortCode string `json:"sort_code,omitempty"` }
type CreateCounterpartyRequestProfileType string

type CreatePaymentDraftResponse struct { ID string `json:"id"` }
type CreatePayoutLinkRequest struct { AccountID PayoutLinkAccountID `json:"account_id"` Amount PayoutLinkAmount `json:"amount"` CounterpartyName PayoutLinkCounterpartyName `json:"counterparty_name"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` ExpiryPeriod PayoutLinkExpiryPeriod `json:"expiry_period,omitempty"` PayoutMethods []PayoutMethod `json:"payout_methods,omitempty"` Reference string `json:"reference"` RequestID PayoutLinkRequestID `json:"request_id"` SaveCounterparty bool `json:"save_counterparty,omitempty"` TransferReasonCode TransferReasonCode `json:"transfer_reason_code,omitempty"` }
type CreateTaxRateRequest struct { Name string `json:"name"` Percentage json.Number `json:"percentage"` }
type CreateWebhookRequest struct { Events []WebhookEventType `json:"events,omitempty"` URL URL `json:"url"` }
type Currency core.Currency
type Error struct { Code int `json:"code"` Message string `json:"message"` }
type ErrorUnauthorized struct { Message string `json:"message"` Status int `json:"status"` }
type ErrorUnprocessableEntity struct { Code int `json:"code,omitempty"` Message string `json:"message"` }
type ErrorWithID struct { Code int `json:"code"` ErrorID string `json:"error_id"` Message string `json:"message"` }
type ErrorWithStatus struct { Message string `json:"message"` Status int `json:"status"` }
type EstimatedTime struct { Max int `json:"max,omitempty"` Min int `json:"min,omitempty"` Unit EstimatedTimeUnit `json:"unit"` }
type EstimatedTimeUnit string
type ExchangePartFrom struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` }
type ExchangePartTo struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` }
type ExchangeRateResponse struct { Fee Fee `json:"fee"` From AmountWithCurrency `json:"from"` Rate json.Number `json:"rate"` RateDate time.Time `json:"rate_date"` To AmountWithCurrency `json:"to"` }
type ExchangeReason struct { Code ExchangeReasonCode `json:"code"` Name string `json:"name"` }
type ExchangeReasonCode string
type ExchangeRequest struct { ExchangeReasonCode ExchangeReasonCode `json:"exchange_reason_code,omitempty"` From ExchangePartFrom `json:"from"` Reference string `json:"reference,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id"` To ExchangePartTo `json:"to"` }
type ExchangeResponse struct { CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty"` CreatedAt *time.Time `json:"created_at,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id,omitempty"` ReasonCode string `json:"reason_code,omitempty"` State TransactionState `json:"state,omitempty"` Type string `json:"type,omitempty"` }
type Expense struct { CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty"` Description string `json:"description,omitempty"` ExpenseDate time.Time `json:"expense_date"` ID string `json:"id"` Labels map[string][]string `json:"labels"` Merchant string `json:"merchant,omitempty"` Payer string `json:"payer,omitempty"` ReceiptIds []string `json:"receipt_ids"` SpentAmount *ExpenseSpentAmount `json:"spent_amount"` Splits []ExpenseSplit `json:"splits"` State ExpenseState `json:"state"` SubmittedAt *time.Time `json:"submitted_at,omitempty"` TransactionID string `json:"transaction_id,omitempty"` TransactionType ExpenseTransactionType `json:"transaction_type"` }
type ExpenseSpentAmount struct { Amount Amount `json:"amount"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` }
type ExpenseSplit struct { Amount *ExpenseSplitAmount `json:"amount"` Category Category `json:"category"` TaxRate TaxRate `json:"tax_rate"` }
type ExpenseSplitAmount struct { Amount Amount `json:"amount,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency,omitempty"` }
type ExpenseState string
type ExpenseTransactionType string
type Expenses struct { t *transport.Transport }

type GetFailedWebhookEventsParams struct { Limit int `json:"limit,omitempty"` CreatedBefore time.Time `json:"created_before,omitempty"` }

type GetRolesParams struct { CreatedBefore time.Time `json:"created_before,omitempty"` Limit json.Number `json:"limit,omitempty"` }

type PageToken string
type PaymentDraftResponse struct { Payments []PaymentInfo `json:"payments"` ScheduledFor *time.Time `json:"scheduled_for,omitempty"` Title string `json:"title,omitempty"` }

type PaymentDraftsResponse struct { PaymentOrders []PaymentOrderInfo `json:"payment_orders"` }
type PaymentInfo struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount AmountWithCurrency `json:"amount"` Currency Currency `json:"currency,omitempty"` CurrentChargeOptions *PaymentInfoCurrentChargeOptions `json:"current_charge_options"` ErrorMessage string `json:"error_message,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` Reason string `json:"reason,omitempty"` Receiver PaymentReceiver `json:"receiver"` Reference string `json:"reference,omitempty"` State PaymentState `json:"state"` }
type PaymentInfoCurrentChargeOptions struct { Fee AmountWithCurrency `json:"fee,omitempty"` From AmountWithCurrency `json:"from"` Rate string `json:"rate,omitempty"` To AmountWithCurrency `json:"to"` }
type PaymentOrderInfo struct { ID string `json:"id"` PaymentsCount int `json:"payments_count"` ScheduledFor *time.Time `json:"scheduled_for,omitempty"` Title string `json:"title,omitempty"` }
type PaymentReceiver struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id,omitempty"` CardID string `json:"card_id,omitempty"` CounterpartyID string `json:"counterparty_id"` }
type PaymentRequest struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` ChargeBearer PaymentRequestChargeBearer `json:"charge_bearer,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` Receiver PaymentReceiver `json:"receiver"` Reference string `json:"reference"` }
type PaymentRequestChargeBearer string
type PaymentState string
type PaymentSystem string
type PayoutLink struct { AccountID PayoutLinkAccountID `json:"account_id"` Amount PayoutLinkAmount `json:"amount"` CancellationReason PayoutLinkCancellationReason `json:"cancellation_reason,omitempty"` CounterpartyID string `json:"counterparty_id,omitempty"` CounterpartyName PayoutLinkCounterpartyName `json:"counterparty_name"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` ExpiryDate PayoutLinkExpiryDate `json:"expiry_date,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` PayoutMethods []PayoutMethod `json:"payout_methods"` Reference PayoutLinkReference `json:"reference"` RequestID PayoutLinkRequestID `json:"request_id"` SaveCounterparty bool `json:"save_counterparty"` State PayoutLinkState `json:"state"` TransactionID string `json:"transaction_id,omitempty"` TransferReasonCode TransferReasonCode `json:"transfer_reason_code,omitempty"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` URL string `json:"url,omitempty"` }
type PayoutLinkAccountID string

type PayoutLinkAmount json.Number

type PayoutLinkRequestID string

type PayoutMethod string

type SpendProgram struct { Label string `json:"label"` }
type SpendingLimitPeriodic struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Currency TransactionLimitCurrency `json:"currency"` }
type SpendingLimitSingleTransaction struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Currency TransactionLimitCurrency `json:"currency"` }
type SpendingLimits struct { AllTime SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"all_time,omitempty"` Day SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"day,omitempty"` Month SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"month,omitempty"` Quarter SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"quarter,omitempty"` Single SpendingLimitSingleTransaction `json:"single,omitempty"` Week SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"week,omitempty"` Year SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"year,omitempty"` }
type SpendingLimitsSchema struct { AllTime SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"all_time,omitempty"` Day SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"day,omitempty"` Month SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"month,omitempty"` Quarter SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"quarter,omitempty"` Single SpendingLimitSingleTransaction `json:"single,omitempty"` Week SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"week,omitempty"` Year SpendingLimitPeriodic `json:"year,omitempty"` }
type SpendingPeriodSchema struct { EndDate *time.Time `json:"end_date,omitempty"` EndDateAction SpendingPeriodSchemaEndDateAction `json:"end_date_action,omitempty"` StartDate *time.Time `json:"start_date,omitempty"` }
type SpendingPeriodSchemaEndDateAction string
type TaxRate struct { ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` Percentage json.Number `json:"percentage,omitempty"` }
type TaxRateResponse struct { CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` Percentage json.Number `json:"percentage,omitempty"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type TeamMember struct { CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Email string `json:"email"` FirstName string `json:"first_name,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id"` LastName string `json:"last_name,omitempty"` RoleID string `json:"role_id"` State TeamMemberState `json:"state"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type TeamMemberState string
type TeamMembers struct { t *transport.Transport }
type TeamMembersBody struct { Email string `json:"email"` RoleID string `json:"role_id"` }
type Transaction struct { Card TransactionCard `json:"card,omitempty"` CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` ID string `json:"id"` Legs []TransactionLeg `json:"legs"` Merchant TransactionMerchant `json:"merchant,omitempty"` ReasonCode string `json:"reason_code,omitempty"` Reference string `json:"reference,omitempty"` RelatedTransactionID string `json:"related_transaction_id,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id,omitempty"` ScheduledFor *time.Time `json:"scheduled_for,omitempty"` State TransactionState `json:"state"` Type TransactionType `json:"type"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` }
type TransactionCard struct { CardNumber string `json:"card_number,omitempty"` FirstName string `json:"first_name,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id,omitempty"` LastName string `json:"last_name,omitempty"` Phone string `json:"phone,omitempty"` References []CardReference `json:"references,omitempty"` }
type TransactionCounterparty struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id,omitempty"` AccountType TransactionCounterpartyAccountType `json:"account_type"` ID string `json:"id,omitempty"` }
type TransactionCounterpartyAccountType string
type TransactionLeg struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Balance json.Number `json:"balance,omitempty"` BillAmount json.Number `json:"bill_amount,omitempty"` BillCurrency Currency `json:"bill_currency,omitempty"` Counterparty TransactionCounterparty `json:"counterparty,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` Description string `json:"description,omitempty"` Fee json.Number `json:"fee,omitempty"` LegID string `json:"leg_id"` }
type TransactionLimitCurrency core.Currency
type TransactionMerchant struct { CategoryCode string `json:"category_code,omitempty"` City string `json:"city,omitempty"` Country CountryCodeMerchant `json:"country,omitempty"` ID string `json:"id,omitempty"` Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` }
type TransactionPaymentRequest struct { AccountID string `json:"account_id"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` ChargeBearer ChargeBearer `json:"charge_bearer,omitempty"` Currency Currency `json:"currency,omitempty"` ExchangeReasonCode ExchangeReasonCode `json:"exchange_reason_code,omitempty"` Receiver PaymentReceiver `json:"receiver"` Reference string `json:"reference,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id"` TransferReasonCode TransferReasonCode `json:"transfer_reason_code,omitempty"` }
type TransactionState string
type TransactionType string
type Transactions struct { t *transport.Transport }
type TransactionsIDType string
type TransferReason struct { Code TransferReasonCode `json:"code"` Country CountryCode `json:"country"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` Description string `json:"description"` }
type TransferReasonCode string
type TransferRequest struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Currency Currency `json:"currency"` Reference string `json:"reference,omitempty"` RequestID string `json:"request_id"` SourceAccountID string `json:"source_account_id"` TargetAccountID string `json:"target_account_id"` }
type TransferResponse struct { CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` ID string `json:"id"` State TransactionState `json:"state"` }
type Transfers struct { t *transport.Transport }
type URL string
type UpdateAccountingCategoryRequest struct { Code string `json:"code,omitempty"` DefaultTaxRateID string `json:"default_tax_rate_id,omitempty"` Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` }
type UpdateLabelGroupRequest struct { Name string `json:"name"` }
type UpdateLabelRequest struct { Name string `json:"name"` }
type UpdateTaxRateRequest struct { Name string `json:"name,omitempty"` }
type UpdateWebhookRequest struct { Events []WebhookEventType `json:"events,omitempty"` URL URL `json:"url,omitempty"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequest struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no,omitempty"` BSB string `json:"bsb,omitempty"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameRequestIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` IBAN string `json:"iban,omitempty"` RecipientCountry string `json:"recipient_country,omitempty"` RecipientCurrency core.Currency `json:"recipient_currency,omitempty"` SortCode string `json:"sort_code,omitempty"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestAU struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no"` BSB string `json:"bsb"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameRequestAUIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestAUIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestEUR struct { BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IBAN string `json:"iban"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameRequestEURIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` RecipientCountry string `json:"recipient_country"` RecipientCurrency core.Currency `json:"recipient_currency"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestEURIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestRO struct { BIC string `json:"bic,omitempty"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IBAN string `json:"iban"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameRequestROIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` RecipientCountry string `json:"recipient_country"` RecipientCurrency core.Currency `json:"recipient_currency"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestROIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestUK struct { AccountNo string `json:"account_no"` CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameRequestUKIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` SortCode string `json:"sort_code"` }
type ValidateAccountNameRequestUKIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponse struct { CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameResponseIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Reason AccountNameValidationReasonAU `json:"reason,omitempty"` ResultCode ValidateAccountNameResponseResultCode `json:"result_code,omitempty"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseAU struct { CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameResponseAUIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Reason AccountNameValidationReasonAU `json:"reason,omitempty"` ResultCode ValidateAccountNameResponseAUResultCode `json:"result_code"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseAUIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseAUResultCode string
type ValidateAccountNameResponseEUR struct { CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameResponseEURIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Reason AccountNameValidationReasonEUR `json:"reason,omitempty"` ResultCode ValidateAccountNameResponseEURResultCode `json:"result_code"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseEURIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseEURResultCode string
type ValidateAccountNameResponseIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseRO struct { CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameResponseROIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Reason AccountNameValidationReasonRO `json:"reason,omitempty"` ResultCode ValidateAccountNameResponseROResultCode `json:"result_code"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseROIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseROResultCode string
type ValidateAccountNameResponseResultCode string
type ValidateAccountNameResponseUK struct { CompanyName string `json:"company_name,omitempty"` IndividualName *ValidateAccountNameResponseUKIndividualName `json:"individual_name,omitempty"` Reason AccountNameValidationReasonUK `json:"reason,omitempty"` ResultCode ValidateAccountNameResponseUKResultCode `json:"result_code"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseUKIndividualName struct { FirstName string `json:"first_name"` LastName string `json:"last_name"` }
type ValidateAccountNameResponseUKResultCode string
type WebhookEvent struct { CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` ID string `json:"id"` LastSentDate *time.Time `json:"last_sent_date,omitempty"` Payload map[string]any `json:"payload"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` WebhookID string `json:"webhook_id"` WebhookURL string `json:"webhook_url"` }
type WebhookEventType string
type WebhookSigningSecretRotateRequest struct { ExpirationPeriod string `json:"expiration_period,omitempty"` }
type WebhookV1 struct { URL string `json:"url"` }
type WebhookV2 struct { Events []WebhookEventType `json:"events"` ID string `json:"id"` SigningSecret string `json:"signing_secret"` URL string `json:"url"` }
type WebhookV2Basic struct { Events []WebhookEventType `json:"events"` ID string `json:"id"` URL string `json:"url"` }
type WebhooksV2 struct { t *transport.Transport }
